factor_name_zh: 结构函数振幅因子（tau=10, s=20）
short_desc_en: A neighboring-horizon Structure Function variability signal used to test whether the astronomy-inspired effect persists beyond the fastest setting.
short_desc_zh: 一个相邻尺度的 Structure Function 时域变异性信号，用来检验天文启发效果是否不只存在于最短参数。

description.motivation_en: Tau=10 is kept mainly as a robustness check. If the Structure Function idea is real, it should not disappear immediately once the lag moves from 5 days to 10 days.
description.motivation_zh: tau=10 主要是作为稳健性检验保留下来的。如果 Structure Function 这条思路是真的抓到了某种时域结构，它不应该在滞后从 5 日换到 10 日之后立刻失效。
description.construction_en:
The form stays the same as the tau=5 version, but the lag moves to $\tau=10$ while the smoothing window remains 20 days:

$$SF_t(10)=\frac{1}{20}\sum_{i=0}^{19}(r_{t-i}-r_{t-i-10})^2$$

That makes it a direct neighboring-scale test of the same variability logic.
description.construction_zh:
构造方式和 tau=5 完全一致，只是固定滞后换成了 $\tau=10$，平滑窗口仍然是 20 日：

$$SF_t(10)=\frac{1}{20}\sum_{i=0}^{19}(r_{t-i}-r_{t-i-10})^2$$

所以它本质上是在相邻时间尺度上复查同一个变异性逻辑。
description.interpretation_en: Tau=10 is less about winning the ranking on every metric and more about showing that the SF idea does not rely on one lucky parameter. It helps the family look like a real line of research instead of a single-point result.
description.interpretation_zh: tau=10 的意义不在于每个指标都要赢，而在于它说明 SF 这条线不是靠一个幸运参数撑起来的。它让整个因子家族更像一条真实的研究路线，而不是单点命中。

analysis_note_en: If tau=5 is the headline result, tau=10 is the first piece of evidence that the story survives a small change in timescale.
analysis_note_zh: 如果说 tau=5 是主结果，那么 tau=10 就是第一块稳健性证据：时间尺度稍微放慢一点，这条线仍然能成立。
